elements.title: lang::report_page_091_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT CONCAT(kbi_t.courseid, '-', WEEKDAY(FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_l.timepoint)), '-',
              CASE
                WHEN HOUR(FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_l.timepoint)) < 6 THEN 1
                WHEN HOUR(FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_l.timepoint)) < 9 THEN 2
                WHEN HOUR(FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_l.timepoint)) < 12 THEN 3
                WHEN HOUR(FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_l.timepoint)) < 15 THEN 4
                WHEN HOUR(FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_l.timepoint)) < 18 THEN 5
                WHEN HOUR(FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_l.timepoint)) < 21 THEN 6
                ELSE 7
              END)                                                        AS id,
       kbi_c.id                                                           AS courseid,
       kbi_c.fullname                                                     AS course,
       kbi_cc.name                                                        AS category_name,
       WEEKDAY(FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_l.timepoint))                            AS weekday_number,
       CASE WEEKDAY(FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_l.timepoint))
         WHEN 0 THEN 'Monday'
         WHEN 1 THEN 'Tuesday'
         WHEN 2 THEN 'Wednesday'
         WHEN 3 THEN 'Thursday'
         WHEN 4 THEN 'Friday'
         WHEN 5 THEN 'Saturday'
         ELSE 'Sunday'
       END                                                                AS weekday_name,
       CASE
         WHEN HOUR(FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_l.timepoint)) < 6 THEN '00:00 - 05:59'
         WHEN HOUR(FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_l.timepoint)) < 9 THEN '06:00 - 08:59'
         WHEN HOUR(FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_l.timepoint)) < 12 THEN '09:00 - 11:59'
         WHEN HOUR(FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_l.timepoint)) < 15 THEN '12:00 - 14:59'
         WHEN HOUR(FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_l.timepoint)) < 18 THEN '15:00 - 17:59'
         WHEN HOUR(FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_l.timepoint)) < 21 THEN '18:00 - 20:59'
         ELSE '21:00 - 23:59'
       END                                                                AS active_period,
       SUM(kbi_l.visits)                                                  AS visits,
       SUM(kbi_l.timespend)                                               AS timespend,
       ROUND(SUM(kbi_l.timespend) / 3600, 2)                              AS hours_spent,
       ROUND(SUM(kbi_l.timespend) * 100 / NULLIF(kbi_total.total_timespend, 0), 2) AS percent_of_course_time
FROM mdl_local_kopere_bi_track_log kbi_l
       JOIN mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking kbi_t ON kbi_t.id = kbi_l.trackid
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_t.courseid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_categories kbi_cc ON kbi_cc.id = kbi_c.category
       JOIN (
             SELECT kbi_t2.courseid,
                    SUM(kbi_l2.timespend) AS total_timespend
             FROM mdl_local_kopere_bi_track_log kbi_l2
                    JOIN mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking kbi_t2 ON kbi_t2.id = kbi_l2.trackid
             WHERE kbi_t2.courseid > 1
             GROUP BY kbi_t2.courseid
       ) kbi_total ON kbi_total.courseid = kbi_t.courseid
WHERE kbi_t.courseid > 1
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
GROUP BY kbi_c.id, kbi_cc.id, weekday_number, active_period, kbi_total.total_timespend
ORDER BY kbi_c.fullname, weekday_number, active_period
